meaning: n.[希神]提瑞西阿斯(古希腊城邦 Thebes 的一位盲人先知)
examples: Tiresias was a blind, dark seeing prophet of Thebes.
This large print title is set in Tiresias 16pt font as recommended by the RNIB.
I, for one, won't ever forget the blind seer Tiresias "reading the future" of the city of Thebes by searching Baidu for a prophecy!
Co-starring Julian Beck, as a remarkably contemporary and streetwise Tiresias.
